response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in network switch firmware, MACsec, 802.1X, or embedded security technologies—all central to the role. Their experience is predominantly in web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with no evidence of embedded networking or security firmware development.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Experience with DevOps tooling and CI/CD infrastructure setup
concerns: No proven C programming experience in UNIX embedded environments
Lacks native Japanese language proficiency (mandatory requirement)
No exposure to LAN-switch firmware, Linux kernel security, or network security protocols like MACsec or 802.1X
